name: Side Plank
shortDescription: A core-strengthening hold performed on one side, engaging the obliques and stabilizing hip muscles.
instructions: Lie on one side with your elbow under your shoulder and legs extended. Lift your hips off the ground to form a straight line from head to feet, bracing your abs and holding the position while breathing steadily.
steps: Lie on your side, elbow stacked under shoulder.
Stack your feet or place one in front of the other.
Raise hips up to create a straight line.
Hold body in line, keeping abs and glutes engaged.
Lower hips gently to finish; switch sides.
